explanation.disease_text_preview: Disease: Neuroendocrine neoplasm of appendix Description: A well differentiated, low or intermediate grade tumor with neuroendocrine differentiation that arises from the appendix. Phenotypes: Primary hypercortisolism; Palpitations; Nausea and vomiting; Constipation; Anorexia; Asthma; Hepatomegaly; E
